widgets.title: Unit Cost Distribution by Category
widgets.description: Proportion of total unit cost aggregated by product category.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "category" AS label, CAST(SUM("unit_cost" * "on_hand") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY "category" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Unit Cost by Product Name
widgets.description: Average unit cost for each product name in the inventory
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_name" AS label, AVG("unit_cost") AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY "product_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Unit Cost Over Last Received
widgets.description: Average unit cost trend over time based on last received dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "last_received") AS VARCHAR) AS x, AVG("unit_cost") AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" WHERE "last_received" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date_trunc('month', "last_received") ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Total Unit Cost
widgets.description: Sum of all unit costs across inventory items
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Total Unit Cost' AS label, CAST(SUM("unit_cost") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_retail_inventory" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: List Price by Product Name Over Last Received
widgets.description: Trend of average list price for each product name over time based on last received date, aggregated monthly.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "last_received") AS VARCHAR) AS x, "product_name" AS series, AVG("list_price") AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" WHERE "last_received" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Unit Cost vs List Price Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between unit cost and list price for products in inventory.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "sku" AS "col1", "unit_cost" AS "x", "list_price" AS "y" FROM "t_retail_inventory" WHERE "unit_cost" IS NOT NULL AND "list_price" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: List Price Volume Over Last Received
widgets.description: Shows the total list price volume aggregated by month based on the last received date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "last_received") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("list_price" * "on_hand") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: List Price Frequency Distribution
widgets.description: Distribution of products by list price buckets of $10 intervals
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CONCAT('$', CAST(FLOOR("list_price" / 10) * 10 AS VARCHAR), ' - $', CAST(FLOOR("list_price" / 10) * 10 + 9.99 AS VARCHAR)) AS "bucket", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS "count" FROM "t_retail_inventory" WHERE "list_price" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FLOOR("list_price" / 10) ORDER BY FLOOR("list_price" / 10) ASC LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Product Name × Category Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing total on-hand inventory by product name and category.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_name" AS row, "category" AS col, CAST(SUM("on_hand") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY row, col ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Product Name Ranked by List Price
widgets.description: Top 25 products ranked by their list price in descending order.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_name" AS label, CAST("list_price" AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Product Name Composition by Category
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the composition of product names within each category based on total on-hand inventory.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "category" AS label, "product_name" AS "group", CAST(SUM("on_hand") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Product Name Composition Over Last Received
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing the composition of available inventory by product name over time based on last_received date truncated by month.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "last_received") AS VARCHAR) AS x, "product_name" AS series, CAST(SUM("available") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Unit Cost vs List Price by Product Name
widgets.description: Compare unit cost and list price for each product to visualize pricing margins.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_name" AS label, CAST(AVG("unit_cost") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(AVG("list_price") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY "product_name" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Avg Daily Demand Proportion by Product Name
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of average daily demand for each product name relative to the total average daily demand.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("avg_daily_demand") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY "product_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Product Name
widgets.description: Comparison of average margin percentage, average days of supply, and annual turnover by product name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_name" AS axis, CAST(AVG("margin_pct") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_retail_inventory" GROUP BY "product_name" ORDER BY "value" DESC LIMIT 12
